free_text: Production cross sections of elements near the N =
126 shell in 48Ca- induced reactions with 154Gd,159Tb,
162Dy, and 165Ho targets
Experimental data were collected at
the Cyclotron Institute at Texas A&M University by
utilizing K500 cyclotron and the MARS Spectrometer
Reaction products were separated from primary
beam according to momentum and velocity using
separator MARS, consisting of two dipole magnets,
Wien filter and focusing quadrupoles
Transmitted reaction products were detected by
a 16- strip position-sensitive silicon detector with
an active area of 50 x 50 mm2.
Statistical uncertainty
Absolute uncertainty, primarily from systematic
uncertainty in the transmission of MARS.
Compiled by S.H.
